revision.text:
'''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は水で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（金生水）である。
==辛亥の年==
==辛亥の日== ===[[選日]]===

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

{{干支}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |画像種別 = |画像 = |画像の説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。 干支の組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] *[[951年]] | *[[1011年]] *[[1071年]] *[[1131年]] *[[1191年]] *[[1251年]] *[[1311年]] *[[1371年]] *[[1431年]] *[[1491年]] *[[1551年]] *[[1611年]] *[[1671年]] *[[1731年]] *[[1791年]] *[[1851年]] *[[1911年]] *[[1971年]] | *[[2031年]] *[[2091年]] *[[2151年]] *[[2211年]] *[[2271年]] *[[2331年]] *[[2391年]] *[[2451年]] *[[2511年]] *[[2571年]] *[[2631年]] *[[2691年]] *[[2751年]] *[[2811年]] *[[2871年]] *[[2931年]] *[[2991年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[1911年]] - [[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:辛亥]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。 干支の組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] *[[951年]] | *[[1011年]] *[[1071年]] *[[1131年]] *[[1191年]] *[[1251年]] *[[1311年]] *[[1371年]] *[[1431年]] *[[1491年]] *[[1551年]] *[[1611年]] *[[1671年]] *[[1731年]] *[[1791年]] *[[1851年]] *[[1911年]] *[[1971年]] | *[[2031年]] *[[2091年]] *[[2151年]] *[[2211年]] *[[2271年]] *[[2331年]] *[[2391年]] *[[2451年]] *[[2511年]] *[[2571年]] *[[2631年]] *[[2691年]] *[[2751年]] *[[2811年]] *[[2871年]] *[[2931年]] *[[2991年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[1911年]] - [[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:辛亥]]

{{干支}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |画像種別 = |画像 = |画像の説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。 干支の組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] *[[951年]] | *[[1011年]] *[[1071年]] *[[1131年]] *[[1191年]] *[[1251年]] *[[1311年]] *[[1371年]] *[[1431年]] *[[1491年]] *[[1551年]] *[[1611年]] *[[1671年]] *[[1731年]] *[[1791年]] *[[1851年]] *[[1911年]] *[[1971年]] | *[[2031年]] *[[2091年]] *[[2151年]] *[[2211年]] *[[2271年]] *[[2331年]] *[[2391年]] *[[2451年]] *[[2511年]] *[[2571年]] *[[2631年]] *[[2691年]] *[[2751年]] *[[2811年]] *[[2871年]] *[[2931年]] *[[2991年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[1911年]] - [[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:辛亥]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[干支]]の一つ。 干支の組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] *[[951年]] | *[[1011年]] *[[1071年]] *[[1131年]] *[[1191年]] *[[1251年]] *[[1311年]] *[[1371年]] *[[1431年]] *[[1491年]] *[[1551年]] *[[1611年]] *[[1671年]] *[[1731年]] *[[1791年]] *[[1851年]] *[[1911年]] *[[1971年]] | *[[2031年]] *[[2091年]] *[[2151年]] *[[2211年]] *[[2271年]] *[[2331年]] *[[2391年]] *[[2451年]] *[[2511年]] *[[2571年]] *[[2631年]] *[[2691年]] *[[2751年]] *[[2811年]] *[[2871年]] *[[2931年]] *[[2991年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[1911年]] - [[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:unsorted completion categories]][[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:辛亥]]

{{干支}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。 Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] *[[951年]] | *[[1011年]] *[[1071年]] *[[1131年]] *[[1191年]] *[[1251年]] *[[1311年]] *[[1371年]] *[[1431年]] *[[1491年]] *[[1551年]] *[[1611年]] *[[1671年]] *[[1731年]] *[[1791年]] *[[1851年]] *[[1911年]] *[[1971年]] | *[[2031年]] *[[2091年]] *[[2151年]] *[[2211年]] *[[2271年]] *[[2331年]] *[[2391年]] *[[2451年]] *[[2511年]] *[[2571年]] *[[2631年]] *[[2691年]] *[[2751年]] *[[2811年]] *[[2871年]] *[[2931年]] *[[2991年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[1911年]] - [[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[ja:辛亥]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。 Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] *[[951年]] | *[[1011年]] *[[1071年]] *[[1131年]] *[[1191年]] *[[1251年]] *[[1311年]] *[[1371年]] *[[1431年]] *[[1491年]] *[[1551年]] *[[1611年]] *[[1671年]] *[[1731年]] *[[1791年]] *[[1851年]] *[[1911年]] *[[1971年]] | *[[2031年]] *[[2091年]] *[[2151年]] *[[2211年]] *[[2271年]] *[[2331年]] *[[2391年]] *[[2451年]] *[[2511年]] *[[2571年]] *[[2631年]] *[[2691年]] *[[2751年]] *[[2811年]] *[[2871年]] *[[2931年]] *[[2991年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[1911年]] - [[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[ja:辛亥]]

[[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:辛亥]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。 Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] *[[951年]] | *[[1011年]] *[[1071年]] *[[1131年]] *[[1191年]] *[[1251年]] *[[1311年]] *[[1371年]] *[[1431年]] *[[1491年]] *[[1551年]] *[[1611年]] *[[1671年]] *[[1731年]] *[[1791年]] *[[1851年]] *[[1911年]] *[[1971年]] | *[[2031年]] *[[2091年]] *[[2151年]] *[[2211年]] *[[2271年]] *[[2331年]] *[[2391年]] *[[2451年]] *[[2511年]] *[[2571年]] *[[2631年]] *[[2691年]] *[[2751年]] *[[2811年]] *[[2871年]] *[[2931年]] *[[2991年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[1911年]] - [[辛亥革命]] ==辛亥の月== 西暦年の下1桁が、2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[10月]]が、辛亥の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただし、ここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立冬]]から[[大雪]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。 ==辛亥の日== ===選日=== なし ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:辛亥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Metal Pig-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[ja:Yin Metal Pig]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi}} }} '''辛亥'''（かのとい、しんきんのいのしし、しんがい）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。 Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの48番目で、前は[[庚戌]]、次は[[壬子]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[辛]]は陰の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[亥]]は陰の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。 ==辛亥の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って51が余る年が辛亥の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''辛亥の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[51年]] *[[111年]] *[[171年]] *[[231年]] *[[291年]] *[[351年]] *[[411年]] *[[471年]] *[[531年]] *[[591年]] *[[651年]] *[[711年]] *[[771年]] *[[831年]] *[[891年]] しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь Revolution]] ==Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)'s Months== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)'s Days== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[sn:Yin Metal Pig]] [[en:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[sn:in Metal Pig]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichouja]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]]

Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Metal Pig]][[Category:qq]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[sn:Yin Metal Pig]] [[en:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[sn:in Metal Pig]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichouja]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh_min_nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh_yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh_min_nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh_yue:辛亥]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905052]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Pig|kanji=辛亥|romaji=kanoto i|onyomi=shingai|p=xīhài|w=hsin-hai|mi=ɕin⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=san1 hoi6|j=san1 hoi6|ci=sɐn hɐi|mc=sin ɣəi|oc-bs=sin ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905052]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Pig|kanji=辛亥|romaji=kanoto i|onyomi=shingai|p=xīhài|w=hsin-hai|mi=ɕin⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=san1 hoi6|j=san1 hoi6|ci=sɐn hɐi|mc=sin ɣəi|oc-bs=sin ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years of Yin Metal Pig== A year in the {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905052]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Pig|kanji=辛亥|romaji=kanoto i|onyomi=shingai|p=xīhài|w=hsin-hai|mi=ɕin⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=san1 hoi6|j=san1 hoi6|ci=sɐn hɐi|mc=sin ɣəi|oc-bs=sin ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years of Yin Metal Pig== A year in the しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905052]] Wikidata name: Yin Metal Pig [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Pig|kanji=辛亥|romaji=kanoto i|onyomi=shingai|p=xīhài|w=hsin-hai|mi=ɕin⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=san1 hoi6|j=san1 hoi6|ci=sɐn hɐi|mc=sin ɣəi|oc-bs=sin ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years of Yin Metal Pig== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 51 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)'s years table''' |- ! Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}}

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}}
