しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe [[:en:October|October]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Qq]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years Revolution]] ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe {{ill|1911 Revolution|en|1911 Revolution|WD=Q190517|lt=Xinhai Revolution}} ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]

revision.text:
[[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Pig|kanji=辛亥|romaji=kanoto i|onyomi=shingai|p=xīhài|w=hsin-hai|mi=ɕin⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=san1 hoi6|j=san1 hoi6|ci=sɐn hɐi|mc=sin ɣəi|oc-bs=sin ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|WD=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years of Yin Metal Pig== A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 51 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year}} of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium}} |- | * {{ill|AD 51|en|AD 51|WD=Q23439|lt=51 AD}} * {{ill|AD 111|en|AD 111|WD=Q30640|lt=111 AD}} * {{ill|171|en|171|WD=Q31289|lt=171 AD}} * {{ill|1911 Revolution|en|1911 Revolution|WD=Q190517|lt=Xinhai Revolution}} ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {{ill|1911 Revolution|en|1911 Revolution|WD=Q190517|lt=Xinhai Revolution}} ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:pages]]

{{ill|1911 Revolution|en|1911 Revolution|WD=Q190517|lt=Xinhai Revolution|1=1911 Revolution}} ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:pages]]

しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]][[de:Metall-Schwein]][[eo:Xinhai]][[hak:Sîn-hoi]][[ja:辛亥]][[ko:신해]][[vi:Tân Hợi]][[za:Sinhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]][[zh-yue:辛亥]][[zh:辛亥]] {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Pig|kanji=辛亥|romaji=kanoto i|onyomi=shingai|p=xīhài|w=hsin-hai|mi=ɕin⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=san1 hoi6|j=san1 hoi6|ci=sɐn hɐi|mc=sin ɣəi|oc-bs=sin ɢəʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} {{中華圏の事物 |タイトル = 壬申 |File種別 = |File = |Fileの説明 = |繁体字 = 辛亥 |簡体字 = 辛亥 |ピン音 = xīnhài |通用ピン音 = |注音符号 = ㄒㄧㄣ ㄏㄞˋ |ラテン字 = |カタカナ = シーンハイ |漢音読み = しんがい |慣用読み = かのとい
しんきんのいのしし |ひらがな = |韓国語 = 신해 |ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Tân Hợi|qq=}} }} '''Yin Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}. It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|WD=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal). ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Metal Pig (辛亥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnhài ** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 hoi6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-i ***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-inoshishi ***Onyomi 1: shinkai ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhhae (신해) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Hợi ==Years of Yin Metal Pig== A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 51 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Metal Pig (辛亥)'s {{ill|1911 Revolution|en|1911 Revolution|WD=Q190517|lt=Xinhai Revolution|1=1911 Revolution}} ==Months of Yin Metal Pig== In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 2 or 7 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Xinhai|ja|1=Yin Metal Pig|2=ja|辛亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinhai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Beginning of Winter|1=Lidong}} until the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Metal Pig== === 選日 === None. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}} [[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]] [[zh-yue:乙卯]] {{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Pig|qq=ja|辛亥|version=101506609|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]] [[nds:Erd-Haseni]] [[de:Yin Metal Pig]] [[ja:辛亥]] [[zh:辛亥]] [[ko:신해]] [[fr:Cochon de métal]] [[de:Metall-Schwein]] [[af:Aardehaas (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hasenei]] [[en:Earth Rabbit]] [[fr:Lièvre de terreboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[ko:을묘]] [[vi:Ất Mão]] [[za:Yitceij]] [[zh:乙卯]] [[ar:Yin Metal Pig]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] [[af:Metaalvark (astrologie)]] [[cdo:Sĭng-hâi]] [[eo:Xinhai]] [[hak:Sîn-hoi]] [[vi:Tân Hợi]] [[za:Sinhaih]] [[zh-min-nan:Sin-hāi]] [[zh-yue:辛亥]] {{wikidata link|Q905052}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Git synced pages]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
